homepage.hero.title.description: Homepage hero title (also used as the site title)

homepage.hero.tagline.message: 在雲端、資料 / AI 管線、SaaS 平台與邊緣裝置上隨處執行的無伺服器函式。

homepage.cta.getStarted.description: Call-to-action button leading to the Getting Started overview

homepage.layout.description.description: HTML meta description for the homepage

homepage.cncf.text.description: Sentence on the homepage noting WasmEdge is a CNCF sandbox project. {cncfLink} is replaced with a linked CNCF text.

homepage.feature.develop.title.message: 開發 Wasm 應用程式
homepage.feature.develop.title.description: Title of the homepage feature card for developing Wasm applications

homepage.feature.develop.description.message: 使用 Rust、JavaScript、Go 與 Python 開發 Wasm 應用程式。這些應用程式會被編譯為 Wasm，並在 WasmEdge 沙箱中執行。
homepage.feature.develop.description.description: Description of the homepage feature card for developing Wasm applications

homepage.feature.embed.title.message: 將 Wasm 函式嵌入主機應用程式
homepage.feature.embed.title.description: Title of the homepage feature card for embedding Wasm functions

homepage.feature.embed.description.message: 主機應用程式可使用 Rust、C/C++、Go 與 Java 撰寫。Wasm 函式可在不重新編譯主機的情況下嵌入其中。
homepage.feature.embed.description.description: Description of the homepage feature card for embedding Wasm functions

homepage.feature.extend.title.description: Title of the homepage feature card for extending WasmEdge

homepage.feature.extend.description.message: 使用 Rust 與 C/C++ 開發 WasmEdge 擴充功能與外掛,歡迎一起貢獻 WasmEdge 專案。
homepage.feature.extend.description.description: Description of the homepage feature card for extending WasmEdge
